titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Yahya Ibn Abbad Al-Makki
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Yahya Ibn Abbad Al-Makki

segments: ه عن يحيى بن عبّاد المكيّ فقد رويته عن محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن أبي عبد اللّه الأسديّ الكوفيّ، عن موسى بن عمران النخعيّ، عن عمّه الحسين بن يزيد، عن يحيى بن عبّاد المكّيّ‌.
arabic.text: ه عن يحيى بن عبّاد المكيّ فقد رويته عن محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن أبي عبد اللّه الأسديّ الكوفيّ، عن موسى بن عمران النخعيّ، عن عمّه الحسين بن يزيد، عن يحيى بن عبّاد المكّيّ‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Yahya ibn Abbad Al-Makki has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Abi Abdullah Al-Asadi Al-Kufi, from Musa ibn Imran Al-Nakha'i, from his uncle Al-Husayn ibn Yazid, from Yahya ibn Abbad Al-Makki.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Yahya ibn Abbad Al-Makki has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Abi Abdullah Al-Asadi Al-Kufi, from Musa ibn Imran Al-Nakha'i, from his uncle Al-Husayn ibn Yazid, from Yahya ibn Abbad Al-Makki.
